_meta.purpose: SYNTHETIC-ONLY eval set for the extract-lead-intent Edge Function.
_meta.warning: Every `text` below is invented test copy. This file MUST NEVER be pointed at real buyer messages or real leads. The runner (run.ts) always calls the EF with dry_run:true and a zero sentinel lead_id, so no DB write can happen.

expected_matchers.areas_add_not: NONE of these may appear in areas_add (guarantee 1)
expected_matchers.areas_exclude_not: NONE of these may appear in areas_exclude (guarantee 3)
expected_matchers.property_type_any: actual must be one of these (case-insensitive)
expected_matchers.must_haves_include: each entry must be a case-insensitive substring of some actual must_haves item
expected_matchers.all_empty: every contract field empty/false/null (summary/confidence not asserted)

universal_guarantees: areas_add and areas_exclude never share a member (case-insensitive) — the 'not X -> X' bug
no empty/whitespace entries in areas_add or areas_exclude

cases.text: Kan du sende meg noen fra andre steder, ikke El Raso? Det trenger ikke aa vaere Guardamar.
Show me something near the coast, other places too
we can go up to 600k now
3 bed villa with a pool in Ciudad Quesada under 450k
Just to be clear we do NOT want Torrevieja
Busco casa, but not in El Raso, open to nearby towns
